Algorithm.code: 1. Let _O_ be ? ToObject(*this* value). 1. Let _A_ be ? ArraySpeciesCreate(_O_, 0). 1. Let _n_ be 0. 1. Prepend _O_ to _items_. 1. For each element _E_ of _items_, do 1. Let _spreadable_ be ? IsConcatSpreadable(_E_). 1. If _spreadable_ is *true*, then 1. Let _len_ be ? LengthOfArrayLike(_E_). 1. If _n_ + _len_ > 2<sup>53</sup> - 1, throw a *TypeError* exception. 1. Let _k_ be 0. 1. Repeat, while _k_ < _len_, 1. Let _Pk_ be ! ToString(𝔽(_k_)). 1. Let _exists_ be ? HasProperty(_E_, _Pk_). 1. If _exists_ is *true*, then 1. Let _subElement_ be ? Get(_E_, _Pk_). 1. Perform ? CreateDataPropertyOrThrow(_A_, ! ToString(𝔽(_n_)), _subElement_). 1. Set _n_ to _n_ + 1. 1. Set _k_ to _k_ + 1. 1. Else, 1. NOTE: _E_ is added as a single item rather than spread. 1. If _n_ ≥ 2<sup>53</sup> - 1, throw a *TypeError* exception. 1. Perform ? CreateDataPropertyOrThrow(_A_, ! ToString(𝔽(_n_)), _E_). 1. Set _n_ to _n_ + 1. 1. [id="step-array-proto-concat-set-length"] Perform ? Set(_A_, *"length"*, 𝔽(_n_), *true*). 1. Return _A_.

BuiltinHead.name: Array.prototype.concat
BuiltinHead.virtualPackage: 23 Indexed Collections.1 Array Objects.3 Properties of the Array Prototype Object.2 Array.prototype.concat ( items )

NoteStep.note: _E_ is added as a single item rather than spread.

Section.title: Properties of the Array Prototype Object
